## How to test

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make typecheck` (mypy is `continue-on-error` in CI but local feedback is useful)

## Out of scope

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feat|fix|docs|chore|refactor|test/<short-name>`
- [ ] Conventional Commits used in the squash title
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes
- [ ] No `Co-authored-by:` trailers in commits
